form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 1.5 lengths second at Taree Super Track but did record a useful 17.46 over the 300m journey. Expected to go close with a repeat of latest.

form.formComment: Strong performance racing just off the speed and going on to score by a 0.8 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking a solid 19.63 over the 352m trip. Has the ability and can measure up again.
